title: Delicate Sweet Slovakian Strawberry Pancakes
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring fermented pancakes with a sweet strawberry topping, perfect for a brunch mood. This recipe uses a mirepoix base and is low in calories.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, yeast, and salt to make the pancake batter.
In a separate bowl, combine milk, sugar, and eggs, then add this mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until smooth.
Let the batter rest at room temperature for 1 hour to allow fermentation.
In a pan, sauté the chopped onion, carrots, and celery over medium heat until they are softened.
Add the sliced strawberries to the pan and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat and drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with the strawberry and mirepoix topping.
Garnish with additional sliced strawberries if desired.
